# Description

What this PR does, in one or two sentences.

# Type of contribution

- [ ] Typo / small correction
- [ ] War story for `common-failures.md`
- [ ] New documentation
- [ ] Lab improvement or new lab
- [ ] Skill content (references, configs, scripts)
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Other (please describe)

# Checklist

- [ ] Spelling and grammar checked.
- [ ] All code blocks tested (or marked as untested).
- [ ] No real credentials, IPs, or internal hostnames.
- [ ] No employer-confidential information.
- [ ] If adding a new file, it's referenced from the appropriate `README.md`.
- [ ] If modifying a script, `bash -n script.sh` passes.

# Issue link

Closes # (if applicable)

# Notes for reviewers

Anything specific you'd like reviewers to focus on, or context that
would help them.
